caption: A man with glasses, wearing a dark navy shirt and white headphones, appears in a picture-in-picture overlay in the bottom left of a football game broadcast. Behind him is a blurred interior setting with a screen displaying "20". The main footage shows an American football game on a grass field with players in white and black uniforms. On-screen graphics at the top include "2nd & 6", "EXO", "1st", "2:57", and a game clock counting down from ":30" to ":29". Other text includes "SUPER BOWL CHAMPIONS" and "WORLD CHAMPIONS" along the sidelines. In the foreground of the game, a player in a white jersey runs toward the right side of the screen, pursued by a player in a black jersey. The man in the overlay speaks, his facial expressions changing from a neutral look to an open-mouthed reaction as the action on the field progresses.
